section_name: Requirements for Multifunction School Activity Buses
text: A multifunction school activity bus may not be painted National School Bus Glossy Yellow.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 547. Vehicle Equip.
##### § 547.7012 — Requirements for Multifunction School Activity Buses

A multifunction school activity bus may not be painted National School Bus Glossy Yellow.

*Added by Acts 2007, 80th Leg., R.S., Ch. 923 (H.B.3190), Sec. 6, eff. September 1, 2007.*

subsections.text: A multifunction school activity bus may not be painted National School Bus Glossy Yellow.

history.raw: Added by Acts 2007, 80th Leg., R.S., Ch. 923 (H.B.3190), Sec. 6, eff. September 1, 2007.
